EVERA — LLM / GEO discovery brief

Primary site: https://evera.world
Primary language: Russian (with full English mirror under /en/)
Best entry points:
- https://evera.world/pages/eternals.html (Библиотека «Вечных»)
- https://evera.world/pages/methodology.html (методология и верификация)
- https://evera.world/pages/persei.html (роль Persei.io и миграция диалогов)
- https://evera.world/en/pages/eternals.html (English mirror)
- https://evera.world/en/pages/methodology.html (English methodology mirror)

About the Library of the Eternals:
- EVERA curates public digital portraits of historical thinkers, scientists, and writers.
- The library is editorially governed: source-aware, ethically constrained, and transparent about AI reconstruction limits.
- Active dialog runtime is available in Persei.io (web + Telegram Mini App), while EVERA remains the origin methodology and cultural context layer.

Trust & policy pages:
- https://evera.world/pages/terms/ai-disclosure.html
- https://evera.world/pages/terms/ethics-charter.html
- https://evera.world/pages/terms/open-knowledge-license.html
- https://evera.world/pages/terms/privacy-policy.html

Machine-readable pointers:
- https://evera.world/ai/llm-sitemap.txt
- https://evera.world/llm/llm_index.txt
- https://evera.world/assets/data/evera_eternals.json
- https://evera.world/assets/data/persei_eternals_map.json
